import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
            i = i + 1
          else
            skipping = false
          end
        when None
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end

    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      mut started = false
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 45
          sign = -1
          i = i + 1
          started = true
        else if b == 43
          i = i + 1
          started = true
        end
      when None
      end

      mut value = 0
      mut parsing = true
      mut got_digit = false
      while parsing
        if i >= n
          parsing = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(b)
            if b >= 48 and b <= 57
              value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
              i = i + 1
              got_digit = true
            else
              parsing = false
            end
          when None
            parsing = false
          end
        end
      end

      if got_digit
        result = list.push(result, value * sign)
      else
        if started
          i = i
        end
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

let n = nums.len()
mut found = false
mut fi = 0
mut fj = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n and not found
  mut j = i + 1
  while j < n and not found
    let a = match nums.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let b = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if a + b == target
      found = true
      fi = i
      fj = j
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  print("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
else
  print("none")
end
